nasb.text: then in that case listen to the word of the Lord, O remnant of Judah. Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, “If you really set your mind to enter Egypt and go in to reside there,

esv.text: then hear the word of the Lord, O remnant of Judah. Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: If you set your faces to enter Egypt and go to live there,

cnv.text: 這樣，猶大餘剩的人哪，你們現在要聽耶和華的話！萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘你們若決意去埃及，到那裡寄居，

ccb.text: 那么，你们这些犹大的余民就要听听耶和华的话。以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，‘如果你们决意去埃及住，
